title: High-Throughput Mapping of Long-Range Neuronal Projection Using In Situ Sequencing
abstract: BARseq maps neuronal projections by in situ sequencing of RNA barcodes, preserving spatial information while achieving high throughput. Applied to mouse auditory cortex, mapping 3,579 neurons and resolving projection patterns at single-neuron resolution, revealing cell-type-specific long-range connectivity patterns.
notes: Cross-listed with Zador. BARseq in situ sequencing method for projection mapping.
